title: Otherworldly Roles
description: Adds Custom Roles & Powers to Minecraft
body:
Adds Custom Roles & Powers to minecraft,

This is made for Servers but you can play on single player too, just get run the command "/assignRoles" and it will assign random role and stats to all the players(who doesn't already have a role assigned) on the server,

use the command "/AppraiseMe" to see your own stat and use the command "/ChangeRoles" to change your role(players have too meet a specific requirement to change the role)

it adds the roles:
Monarch
Archer
Alchemist
Human
Sorcerer
Knight

Each roles has it's set powers:

  Monarch: Appraise, AOE Freeze, Summon Knights

  Archer: Arrow Barrage, Snipe, Rapid Fire

  Alchemist: AOE Molten Iron, AOE Poison, AOE Heal Team

  Human: normal humans are too weak to wield powers

  Sorcerer: Fire ball, Flood, Raise The Dead

  Knight: Cosmic Swing, Vertical Slash, Enhanced Strength

Each powers are activated using their own item, the item reciepes are unlocked by getting iron ingots
